text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide is selecting a dessert at the lunch
buffet, when...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! In front of you is just what I was
looking for—our legendary Extra Sweet Banana
Cake!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Or... maybe not. Looks like they're all out.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You can't mean to tell me you've never heard of
it! It's the crème de la crème of the school dessert
world.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Bananas have anti-inflammatory properties, which
means they're great for injuries. I always try to eat
at least one before I start training.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Of course, it also tastes delectable!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The combination of whipped cream and ripe
bananas is simply to die for! As soon as it touches
your tongue, the sensa—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ahem! Unfortunately, it seems they're all out. I
suppose I'll just need to find myself another
dessert today.
